name: personabrand-command-center
description: Personal brand command center — content calendar, AI-assisted generation, performance tracking

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run --prefix client build
